summary: Fixed the routing gap where process_through_template() hardcoded ApprovalTarget::Role("approver") instead of calling self.create_approval_request(). Replaced inline ApprovalRequest construction with a synthetic WorkflowRule passed to create_approval_request(), which now routes through IntelligentRoutingEngine when available. Added a 4th integration test (test_template_based_approval_uses_intelligent_routing) with a MockTemplateRepo to verify template-based approvals also benefit from intelligent routing.
decisions_made: process_through_template() now builds a synthetic WorkflowRule (nil id, template-stage name) and delegates to create_approval_request() instead of constructing ApprovalRequest inline
Added MockTemplateRepo that returns a single Approval-stage template, used by the new template-based routing test
next_steps: Build and run tests: SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo build && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test
Implement a concrete RoutingDataProvider that queries the database (follow-up task)
